name: dns_lookup
description: DNS lookup: A, MX, TXT, CNAME, or reverse (PTR) records
command: if [ '{{type}}' = 'reverse' ]; then host {{target}} 2>/dev/null || nslookup {{target}} 2>/dev/null; else dig +short {{target}} {{type}} 2>/dev/null || host -t {{type}} {{target}} 2>/dev/null || nslookup -type={{type}} {{target}} 2>/dev/null; fi

target.description: Domain name or IP address for reverse lookup

type.description: Record type: A, AAAA, MX, TXT, CNAME, NS, or 'reverse'
